detectors.description:
TESLADOGE.setArbCap(address).arb (TESLADOGE.sol#245) lacks a zero-check on :
		- ArbCap = arb (TESLADOGE.sol#247)

TESLADOGE._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TESLADOGE.sol#409-451) compares to a boolean constant:
	-allowArb == false && sender != _owner && recipient == ArbCap (TESLADOGE.sol#413)
detectors.markdown:
[TESLADOGE._transfer(address,address,uint256)](TESLADOGE.sol#L409-L451) compares to a boolean constant:
	-[allowArb == false && sender != _owner && recipient == ArbCap](TESLADOGE.sol#L413)
